## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (type-check)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New `/api/*` endpoints validate input with a zod schema
- [ ] Server code uses the structured `logger` (no `console`)
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env.example` updated if new vars were added
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changed server utilities
